detail: Weekly research (sonar-deep-research) fabricated source URL and claim. Item: "First ReArm Europe EDIP contracts signed for artillery shells" with source_url https://www.euractiv.com/section/defence/news/eu-unveils-first-rearm-europe-contracts-for-joint-ammo-production/ — URL does not exist (returns Cloudflare challenge/403). Claim conflates March 2024 ASAP €500M allocation with March 2026 EDIP €1.5B programme launch. No such Rheinmetall-Nexter EDIP contract exists. Hallucination propagated: weekly-research → reasoner → synthesiser → publisher → live brief. No pipeline stage validated source URL reachability or cross-checked claim dates against coverage window. Published as ESA lead signal W/E 16 April 2026.
errors: Fabricated source_url: euractiv.com article does not exist
Conflated 2024 ASAP programme with 2026 EDIP programme
Invented Rheinmetall-Nexter contract that never happened
No URL reachability check at any pipeline stage
No date cross-validation between claim date and source publication date
Reasoner accepted fabricated claim as key_evidence without verification
Synthesiser built lead_signal around unverified reasoner claim
Publisher had no factual accuracy gate
resolution: Corrected 2026-04-16: 4 commits to asym-intel-main (9199e1fd, daacbc40, fd8acef6, 12cb854a) correcting report-latest.json, report-2026-04-16.json, weekly-brief.md, report-latest.md. Cloudflare cache purged. R1-R5 guardrails deployed engine-wide (28 commits across pipeline + renderer + Hugo). Source Surfacing Principle added to ENGINE-RULES.md §14. Epistemic dashboard + public transparency page deployed.
